gtc.app.name: gtc
gtc.cmd.doctor.about: Check that required Greentic binaries are available in PATH.
gtc.cmd.install.about: Install Greentic tools and optionally tenant-authorized artifacts.
gtc.cmd.setup.about: Pass through to greentic-setup (bundle lifecycle management).
gtc.cmd.start.about: Start a bundle from local or remote reference.
gtc.cmd.stop.about: Stop a bundle runtime or destroy a deployed environment.
gtc.cmd.add_admin.about: Register an admin client certificate identity for a local bundle.
gtc.cmd.remove_admin.about: Remove an admin client certificate identity from a local bundle.
gtc.cmd.admin.tunnel.about: Open an AWS Session Manager tunnel to the admin API of a deployed bundle.
gtc.arg.locale.help: UI locale for gtc help/output (BCP-47 tag).
gtc.arg.debug_router.help: Print resolved binary and args to stderr before exec.
gtc.help.usage.heading: Usage:
gtc.help.commands.heading: Commands
gtc.help.arguments.heading: Arguments
gtc.help.options.heading: Options
gtc.help.subcommand.about: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
gtc.help.subcommand.arg.command.help: Command path to show help for.
gtc.arg.key.help: Authorization key for the specified tenant.
gtc.arg.bundle_ref.help: Bundle path/ref: local path, file://, oci://, repo://, store://
gtc.arg.add_admin.cn.help: Client certificate Common Name allowed to access the admin API.
gtc.arg.add_admin.public_key_file.help: PEM/OpenSSH public key file for this admin.
gtc.arg.remove_admin.cn.help: Client certificate Common Name to remove.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.target.help: Cloud provider for the admin tunnel.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.local_port.help: Local port to bind for the admin tunnel.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.container.help: Container name inside the ECS task.
gtc.arg.deploy_bundle_source.help: Override the remote bundle source passed to cloud deployers (for example https://.../bundle.gtbundle).
gtc.err.bin_missing_setup: greentic-setup not found in PATH. Install with: cargo install greentic-setup
gtc.err.key_required: A key is required for tenant installs.
gtc.install.using_env_key: Using tenant key from environment variable {env}.
gtc.install.summary_failed: Tenant artifact installation completed with failures.
gtc.cmd.update.about: Force-update all Greentic companion binaries to the latest 0.4.x version.
gtc.update.binstall_missing: cargo-binstall is not installed. Run `gtc install` first.
gtc.start.err.deploy_failed: failed to deploy bundle before start
gtc.stop.err.runtime_destroy_unsupported: --destroy is not supported for runtime target
gtc.stop.err.destroy_required: deployed targets currently require --destroy; stop without destroy is not implemented
gtc.wizard.title: Greentic Developer Wizard
